raw_consumer_statement:
I got to my vacation city on XX/XX/year> the hotel said I had no reservation after only looking at me, I called the booking company their rep hung up on me at least 5 times I had to sleep XXXX night in my car then I returned home the next day First I had no reservation, they said I paid in advance, I need my refund, they knew I had reservations. The XXXXXXXX XXXXXXXX said there was a problem but never said was the problem was, ok!!! 
This credit card company representative told me that I was never in the place/city where I claimed to have been so I was a no show .So the credit card company believed the XXXX company. Remember above I was told at the door I had no reservation how could I have been told in person I had no reservation if I were not at the hotel Of course I have XXXX  tracking, XXXX XXXX  tracking tolls, video and emails etc. 
These people think I am going to pay for a service I never got This is fraud and I know why it happened, this must STOP!! 

The reservation company is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  company is Barclays !
